debug_info.goal:
case succ.cons
α : Type u_1
elt : α
idx' : ℕ
HR :
  ∀ {l : List (List α)} {l1 : List α} {hidx : idx' < l.length},
    (l.set idx' (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten =
      (l.set idx' l1).flatten.insertIdx ((List.take idx' (List.map List.length l)).sum + l1.length) elt
l1 hd : List α
tl : List (List α)
HR2 :
  ∀ {hidx : idx' + 1 < tl.length},
    (tl.set (idx' + 1) (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten =
      (tl.set (idx' + 1) l1).flatten.insertIdx ((List.take (idx' + 1) (List.map List.length tl)).sum + l1.length) elt
hidx : idx' + 1 < (hd :: tl).length
⊢ hd ++ (tl.set idx' (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten =
    (hd ++ (tl.set idx' l1).flatten).insertIdx (hd.length + (List.take idx' (List.map List.length tl)).sum + l1.length)
      elt

proof:
have hidx' : idx' < tl.length := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hidx
          rw [@HR tl l1 hidx']
          have aux : ∀ (pre : List α) (suf : List α) (k : Nat) (e : α),
              pre ++ suf.insertIdx k e = (pre ++ suf).insertIdx (pre.length + k) e := by
            intro pre
            induction pre with
            | nil => intros; simp
            | cons h t ih =>
              intros suf k e
              simp only [List.cons_append, List.length_cons, Nat.succ_add, List.insertIdx_succ_cons]
              exact congrArg (h :: ·) (ih suf k e)
          rw [aux]
          simp only [Nat.add_assoc]
successful_attempts:
have hidx' : idx' < tl.length := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hidx
          rw [@HR tl l1 hidx']
          have aux : ∀ (pre : List α) (suf : List α) (k : Nat) (e : α),
              pre ++ suf.insertIdx k e = (pre ++ suf).insertIdx (pre.length + k) e := by
            intro pre
            induction pre with
            | nil => intros; simp
            | cons h t ih =>
              intros suf k e
              simp only [List.cons_append, List.length_cons, Nat.succ_add, List.insertIdx_succ_cons]
              exact congrArg (h :: ·) (ih suf k e)
          rw [aux]
          simp only [Nat.add_assoc]
